name: prem-oracle
description: A Premier League 2026/27 score predictor with private leagues.

scripts.verify: python3 -m unittest -v test_app.py && node --check app.js && cd worker && npm test
scripts.native:prepare: rm -rf native/www && mkdir -p native/www && cp -R index.html reset-cache.html styles.css app.js sw.js manifest.webmanifest icon.svg icons data vendor native/www/
scripts.native:sync: npm run native:prepare && npx cap sync ios
